context: Marshall gate after v4 re-render that reversed the v3 brand-cold (drop-yellow) + force-diagram overshoots. Screenshots in this dir.
summary: 5/5 PASS (4 design pages + gallery index) — warm anchor (#ffde59) restored to every screen; cool semantic demoted to structure/legend only; no flags.

verdicts.notes: Follow-up fix — the index was missed by the v4 ticket (scoped to the 4 design pages). Was fully brand-cold (0 yellow, near-black ink, all-cool card bars incl. an all-cool hero gradient). Fixed inline: brand-brown ink + cream ground, yellow #ffde59 H1 underline + hero bar (warm anchor), default bars gold; the purple/green/teal cortex-card bars kept as a hairline region-legend cue (sparing, subordinate).

Warm cream ground + bright-yellow #ffde59 anchor on the 'One best-of answer' band; green/blue/purple/teal are legend keys mapping to the I/O flow diagram and three filing nodes — never fills on content cards.

Warm-led card-set: yellow #ffde59 anchor on the 'ONE MIND' band + warm 'MEMORY' ghost text; cool hues demoted to small title dots + legend. The taxonomy tiles that previously flagged cool-on-content now read warm.
Warm cream ground + yellow SLEEP anchor in the cycle diagram; cool on the numbered nodes correctly encodes an ordered 5-step cycle (licensed structure). Amber confined to numbered badges.

HERO: warm cream dominates + bright-yellow #ffde59 anchor in the bottom callout strip + left badges; cool confined to thin structural left-rules (legend) on region cards and the genuine 'Three Shapeable Organs' node diagram. The anatomy deck that drove the brand-cold diagnosis now passes.
